footer.title: Browser tools for cleanup and conversion work
footer.description: The site brings together browser tools for text cleanup, CSV prep, filename changes, PDF cleanup and similar tasks.

hero.eyebrow: Browser tools for repetitive cleanup work
hero.title: Finish repetitive cleanup work in your browser.
hero.description: Use browser tools for list cleanup, CSV prep, filename fixes, PDF page cleanup and subtitle timing adjustments without heavy desktop software.
hero.panelTitle: One place for text, table, file and document cleanup.
panelItems: Clean pasted text and lists before sharing or registering data.
Prepare table data before spreadsheet import, CMS updates or internal tools.
Normalize filenames and document sets before handoff or storage.
hero.footnote: Each tool page includes supported formats, steps, cautions and related guides.

notice.title: Inputs stay in your browser
notice.description: Supported tools process your files and text in the browser. The site does not include a mechanism that sends those inputs for AI training.

principles.title: Why the site is easy to use
principles.description: The site makes input handling clear, keeps review easy before export, and helps you move through related tasks without extra setup.

localFirst.title: Process inputs in-browser
localFirst.description: Supported tools process your files and text in the browser. The site does not include a mechanism that sends those inputs for AI training.

reviewBeforeExport.title: Review before you save
reviewBeforeExport.description: You can check renamed files, converted output or cleaned text before copying or downloading the result.

noInstall.title: Start without installing software
noInstall.description: The tools are designed so you can open the page and start working without extra setup.

multiTool.title: Move between related tools
multiTool.description: Text cleanup, table prep, file organization and related guides are grouped so nearby tasks are easier to continue.

themes.title: Common cleanup themes
themes.description: The site covers recurring cleanup and conversion tasks that usually happen before sharing, uploading or saving files.

emptyState.title: Multiple working tools are now available.
emptyState.description: Open the full directory to browse cleanup, conversion, PDF and subtitle tools from one place.

textCleanup.title: Text cleanup and list shaping
textCleanup.description: Tidy up pasted text, bullet lists and separators so the result is easier to reuse in chat tools, docs and forms.

tablePrep.title: Table and CSV preparation
tablePrep.description: Handle the boring prep work that often happens before spreadsheet imports or CMS updates.

fileNaming.title: Filename and naming helpers
fileNaming.description: Preview naming rules before applying them so shared folders and handoffs stay consistent.

process.title: How the tools work
process.description: Most tools follow the same easy flow: add input, review the result, then copy or download it.

paste.title: Paste or import source data
paste.description: Users should be able to start from text, lists or simple files without setup overhead.

preview.title: Review the cleaned result locally
preview.description: The interface should make differences visible before someone copies or downloads the final output.

finish.title: Copy or export with confidence
finish.description: The handoff step should be obvious and fast, especially for small admin tasks done under time pressure.

upload.question: Will data be uploaded to a server?
upload.answer: Supported tools process your files and text in the browser. The site does not include a mechanism that sends those inputs for AI training.

languages.question: Can I switch between Japanese and English?
languages.answer: Yes. Routing and UI copy are structured around both `/ja` and `/en`, and the language switcher is available directly in the header.

devices.question: Will the tools work on mobile?
devices.answer: The site is responsive, but larger table and file workflows will still feel better on desktop. Simpler text cleanup should remain usable on phones.

structuredData.pageDescription: A browser-based directory page for cleanup, formatting and conversion tools.

ToolIndex.title: Tools
ToolIndex.description: Browse the current cleanup and conversion tools. Each page explains supported formats, steps, cautions and local-processing expectations.
ToolIndex.metadataDescription: Browse the current cleanup and conversion tools available on the site.

relatedTools.title: Check the tool directory for more cleanup tools.
relatedTools.description: The full tool list may include nearby workflows that fit the same task.

relatedArticles.title: Use the guide library for more walkthroughs.
relatedArticles.description: You can also use the footer and fixed pages to confirm policies, contact paths and shared guidance.

GuideIndex.title: Guides
GuideIndex.description: Read plain-language walkthroughs for common cleanup tasks, then jump straight into the matching browser tool when you are ready.
GuideIndex.metadataDescription: Plain-language guides for bulk file renaming, CSV cleanup, PDF page reordering and SRT / VTT subtitle timing fixes.

relatedTools.title: Open the tool directory to browse similar tools.
relatedTools.description: The full tool list may include another workflow that fits the same task.

relatedArticles.title: Browse the guide index for more walkthroughs.
relatedArticles.description: Use the guide library to find other practical explanations around nearby tasks.

Metadata.title: Cleanup & Conversion Toolkit | Browser tools for text cleanup and data prep
Metadata.description: A browser-based tool site for text cleanup, CSV prep, filename changes, PDF page cleanup and similar repetitive tasks.
